languages.text: "Уж не знаю, откуда вам такое известно, Ваше Благородие, но вижу, что знаете наверняка". {n}Сержант серьезно кивает. {/n} "Постараюсь не попадаться ему на глаза лишний раз".
languages.translation_comment:
Стартуем DL_JarubWarned
Изимонд не приходит разбираться с Ярубом

Стартуем DL_JarubWarned
Изимонд не приходит разбираться с Ярубом

languages.text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."
languages.original_text: "Уж не знаю, откуда вам такое известно, Ваше Благородие, но вижу, что знаете наверняка". {n}Сержант серьезно кивает. {/n} "Постараюсь не попадаться ему на глаза лишний раз".

traits.locale_text: "I don't know how you know this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."
"I don't know how you know this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."
"I don't know how you know this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."

languages.text: «No sé cómo lo sabe, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero puedo ver que lo sabe con certeza». {n}El sargento asiente con seriedad.{/n} «Intentaré apartarme de su camino a partir de ahora».
languages.original_text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."

traits.locale_text: «No sé cómo lo sabe, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero puedo ver que lo sabe con certeza». {n}El sargento asiente con seriedad.{/n} «Intentaré apartarme de su camino a partir de ahora».

languages.text: “我不知道您是怎么知道的，大人，但您既然这么说了，那肯定是真的。”{n}军士郑重地点了点头。{/n}“以后我尽量躲着他点。”
languages.original_text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."

traits.locale_text: “我不知道您是怎么知道的，大人，但您既然这么说了，那肯定是真的。”{n}军士郑重地点了点头。{/n}“以后我尽量躲着他点。”

languages.text: « Je sais pas d'où vous tenez vos informations, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais je vois bien que c'est du sérieux. {n}Le sergent acquiesce d'un air grave. {/n}Dorénavant, je tâcherai de me faire oublier. »
languages.original_text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."

traits.locale_text: « Je sais pas d'où vous tenez vos informations, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais je vois bien que c'est du sérieux. {n}Le sergent acquiesce d'un air grave. {/n}Dorénavant, je tâcherai de me faire oublier. »

languages.text: "Bunu nereden bildiğinizi bilmiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim} ama kesin olarak bildiğinizi görebiliyorum." {n}Çavuş ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Bundan sonra ondan uzak durmaya çalışacağım."
languages.original_text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."

traits.locale_text: "Bunu nereden bildiğinizi bilmiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim} ama kesin olarak bildiğinizi görebiliyorum." {n}Çavuş ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Bundan sonra ondan uzak durmaya çalışacağım."

languages.text: "Ich weiß nicht, woher Ihr das wisst, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, aber ich sehe, dass Ihr es wisst." {n}Der Sergeant nickt ernst. {/n} "Ich werde versuchen, ihm von nun an aus dem Weg zu gehen."
languages.original_text: "I don't know how you know this, my {mf|lord|lady}, but I can see that you know it for a fact." {n}The sergeant nods gravely. {/n} "I'll try to keep out of his way from now on."
